seoTitle: Luc Rousseau | Resume, Product Engineer and senior developer
seoDescription: Luc Rousseau's background: product consultant and Product Engineer, 26 years from design to product. Architecture, headless, WordPress, Laravel, React. Quebec and remote.
name: Luc Rousseau
role: Product Engineer · product and senior developer
tagline: Roadmap, architecture and delivery: one thread, from strategy to code.
photoAlt: Luc Rousseau, Product Engineer and senior developer
availability: Open to permanent roles and consulting mandates, across Canada and remote

summary.title: Profile
summary.content:
Product Engineer with a solid web development background, I turn ideas into concrete products. Creative director and designer early on, then programmer, now product and technical leadership: having been on both sides of the brief gives me a rare perspective. Self-taught, I built my expertise in the field, project after project.

I help product and engineering teams decide what to build and why, design how the system should work, then ship it. No handoff, no black box: someone who structures, challenges and delivers, from roadmap to code.

items.label: of experience, from pixels to product
from roadmap to code, no handoff
WordPress, Laravel, APIs, React, Next.js, Vue

items.title: Roadmap and prioritization
items.content: Product goals turned into a clear, sequenced plan with explicit priorities and mapped dependencies.

items.title: Architecture and system design
items.content: Decoupled and headless systems, API contracts, build-vs-buy calls, performance and scalability.

items.title: Technical debt reduction
items.content: Debt treated as a product and risk issue, prioritized to support delivery rather than ignored.

items.title: Delivery supervision
items.content: Quality bar, release discipline, CI/CD, alignment between what was decided and what shipped.

items.summary: One accountable partner for roadmap clarity, architecture decisions and delivery. Not a consultant who leaves a deck, not a dev who takes tickets: someone who structures, challenges and ships.
bullets: Roadmap and prioritization: product goals turned into a clear, sequenced plan with mapped dependencies.

Technical debt treated as a product and risk issue, prioritized against delivery.
Delivery supervision: quality bar, release discipline, CI/CD, alignment between what was decided and what shipped.
Public technical reference: lucrousseau.com site and GitHub repo (Next.js 16, React, i18n, tests, quality hooks).
2 to 3 concurrent mandates maximum, long-term engagements, present in ceremonies and reviews.

education.title: Education
